[[BLOCK:p_56]]
Listen to others—simply hearing them is not enough; engage in active listening.

[[BLOCK:p_58]]
Student Code of Conduct:

[[BLOCK:p_59]]
The following guidelines apply to all students in this course:

[[BLOCK:p_60]]
Do not dominate discussions.

[[BLOCK:p_61]]
Refrain from using offensive or aggressive language.

[[BLOCK:p_62]]
Share relevant information and helpful strategies with your classmates.

[[BLOCK:p_63]]
Maintain an open mind, and feel free to express your views—even if they represent a minority perspective.

[[BLOCK:p_64]]
Adhere to the university’s policies on academic integrity and student conduct.

[[BLOCK:p_65]]
Make-Up Exam and Late Assignment Policy:

[[BLOCK:p_66]]
Make-up exams and late submissions are permitted with appropriate documentation and timely notice to the instructor; however, grade penalties may apply. All such requests will be evaluated on a case-by-case basis.
